textPlain: I've done something similar for the Mint, and it's try page: https://mint-lang.com/sandbox/try (and all interactive snippets).The client (CodeMirror) connects to the language server though WebSocket to offer semantic highlighting and some custom LSP actions related to compiling and serving the project.
The title doesn't make it clear that it's actually about TypeScript plus Deno-specific syntax — and Deno's LSP doesn't run in a worker [1].[1]: https://github.com/denoland/vscode_deno/issues/515
